use_cases: Website footer for SaaS landing pages
Newsletter signup section for tech products
Minimalist footer with social links for web applications
ai_summary: A minimalist footer component featuring a tech-inspired grid background pattern, brand section with animated logo, email newsletter signup input, and social media links. Built with cyan accents on a dark transparent background, using Tailwind CSS for styling and Lucide icons. Designed for modern web applications requiring clean, professional footer sections.
